# JARVIS Vendor Slot

Reserved for a future audited checkout or source snapshot of:

https://github.com/vierisid/jarvis

Do not clone or run until `audits/vendor_clone_checks.md` has an entry for JARVIS.

Research focus:

- daemon architecture;
- sidecar enrollment;
- desktop awareness;
- browser control;
- native app control;
- workflow builder.
